---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ===== GLOBAL ===== */

body{
  background:#f4f6f5;
  font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  max-width:1050px;
  padding-top:8px !important;
}

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:#f9fafb !important;
  font-weight:500;
  font-size:0.95rem;
  transition:0.2s ease;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#d1fae5 !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background:#1f4d3a;
  color:white;
  padding:80px 60px;
  border-radius:18px;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3.5rem;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:720px;
  font-size:1.02rem;
  line-height:1.85;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:30px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}

.card-box h2{
  font-size:1.1rem;
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.card-box p,
.card-box li{
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.8;
}

.card-box ul{
  padding-left:20px;
  margin-bottom:0;
}

/* ===== TAGS ===== */

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  background:#edf2ef;
  color:#163a2d;
  padding:8px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  margin:5px 6px 5px 0;
  font-size:0.88rem;
  font-weight:500;
  border:1px solid #dde5e0;
}

/* ===== TOC ===== */

.sidebar nav[role=doc-toc] ul > li > a{
  color:#374151;
  font-size:0.92rem;
}

.sidebar nav[role=doc-toc] ul > li > a:hover{
  color:#163a2d;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  margin-top:34px;
  text-align:center;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.9rem;
  padding:12px;
}

.footer strong{
  color:#163a2d;
  font-weight:600;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

My Assignments

Assignments and analytical works developed for the EMU430 Data Analytics course.

This section contains coursework, data analysis projects, visualizations, and reports created throughout the semester.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Course Information

Course: EMU430 – Data Analytics
Term: Spring 2026

This page showcases assignments, analytical approaches, and project outcomes developed during the course.

Please use the navigation menu to explore individual assignments and related works.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Topics Covered

<span class="tag">Data Cleaning</span>
<span class="tag">Visualization</span>
<span class="tag">Statistical Analysis</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Exploratory Data Analysis</span>
<span class="tag">Reporting</span>

:::

::: {.card-box}

About These Assignments

The assignments focus on applying analytical thinking and data-driven methodologies to real-world datasets.

Each project includes:

<ul> <li>Data preprocessing and preparation</li> <li>Exploratory analysis</li> <li>Statistical interpretation</li> <li>Visualization techniques</li> <li>Analytical reporting</li> </ul>

The goal is to improve both technical and presentation skills in data analytics.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Latest Update

The most recent update to this page was made on 04/04/2026.

More assignments and analytical reports will be added throughout the semester.

:::

<div class="footer">

Built with <strong>R</strong> and <strong>Quarto</strong>

</div> ```
